login.title: Sign in with WeChat
login.note: Note: Scanning only grants access to your Yuketang session for monitoring. All user data, session information, and API keys are stored locally on your device only.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noActivity: No activity yet. Events will appear here when a class starts.

settings.title: Course Settings
settings.fallbackKeysDesc: When the active key fails, try other keys in order
settings.answerDelayTooltip: Answers are generated immediately when a problem is received, then submitted after the delay. If there is a time limit, a fallback answer will be submitted with 5 seconds remaining (random for choice, blank for short answer)

events.ai_failed: AI answering failed, please answer manually! In the last 5 seconds, random answers will be submitted for single-choice and multiple-choice questions as a fallback, and empty answers will be submitted for short-answer questions as a fallback

common.betaWarning: AI answer accuracy is not guaranteed. If no API key is configured, random answering is used as fallback. If the key is misconfigured or the AI call fails, questions may go unanswered.
